intro.title: Model Context Protocol servers
intro.desc: This repository is a collection of *reference implementations* for the [Model Context Protocol](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/) (MCP), as well as references to community-built servers and additional resources.

detalle.name: servers
detalle.desc: This repository is a collection of *reference implementations* for the Model Context Protocol (MCP), as well as references to community-built servers and additional resources.
detalle.choose_if: necesitas exponer herramientas o contexto a agentes vía MCP
detalle.avoid_if: prefieres conexiones directas sin protocolo estándar
